First American Government Obligations Fund Class X

overview.description: The Defined Duration 5 ETF (DDV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively-managed fund-of-funds that seeks capital appreciation and reduced investment volatility through a rules-based, time-weighted sleeves of stocks and bonds. The fund primarily invests in fixed income securities. DDV was launched on Nov 13, 2025 and is issued by Discipline Funds.
